mark-khoury-v-nira-kooij-2025-09-03.lesson: Pro-se fabricated-citation dismissals signal courts everywhere are spotting AI hallucinations; cite the case when counseling clients.

backhoe-center-ltd-v-abu-gwaid-2025-09-0.lesson: Nine fabricated citations drew a 7,500 ILS sanction abroad; verify every case name against the primary database before filing.

givati-et-al-v-peri-2025-08-31.lesson: Courts in Israel now order pro-se filers to correct AI-fabricated citations; expect the same screening of our filings.

gribble-v-essential-energy-2025-08-29.lesson: Plaintiff invented a judgment by the presiding judge; courts will strike all AI-tainted material when caught.

cunningham-v-healthalliance-nz-limited-2.lesson: Even pro-se AI fabrications now draw formal warnings in NZ Employment Court; warn self-represented adversaries too.

stewart-v-good-shepherd-2025-08-29.lesson: Victoria CA calls AI citations 'phantom authorities'; flag any unverifiable cite to opposing pro-se litigants immediately.

alana-kotler-v-ontario-secondary-school-.lesson: Fifteen-plus unlocatable cites got the application dismissed; a single bad cite poisons the whole brief in labour tribunals.

myers-v-tarion-warranty-corporation-2025.lesson: Ontario tribunals ignore arguments built on AI-fabricated quotes; never file quoted language you haven't copy-verified.

butler-and-national-disability-insurance.lesson: Expert reports drafted with AI got reduced evidentiary weight; require experts to certify no unverified AI assistance.

the-boys-of-rockanje-v-dwaard-2025-08-27.lesson: Blaming 'Word-to-PDF conversion' for fabricated ECLI numbers fooled no one; own the AI use immediately when challenged.

orano-mining-v-niger-2-2025-08-26.lesson: ICSID tribunals now cross-check investment-arbitration citations; fabricated Antin/Crystallex/Rusoro cites can sink a disqualification bid.

babbar-v-tarion-warranty-corporation-202.lesson: Ontario LAT keeps catching AI-invented Tarion precedents; pro-se adversary briefs need full citation audits.

maceachern-flatt-v-university-health-net.lesson: HRTO refused to credit non-existent precedents; always check adversary's 'conflicting jurisprudence' against primary databases.

giacomino-y-otros-v-montserrat-y-otros-2.lesson: Rosario CA referred counsel to the Bar for fabricating a precedent from the same court; same-court citations get verified first.

the-meniscus-trust-v-chief-commissioner-.lesson: NCAT Procedural Direction 7 mandates citation verification when using Gemini/ChatGPT; non-compliance downgrades evidentiary weight.

jml-rose-pty-ltd-v-jorgensen-no-3-2025-0.lesson: Federal Court of Australia now calls AI 'hallucinations' fabrications; expect hostile framing when we defend AI-assisted filings.

xh-v-canada-employment-insurance-commiss.lesson: Canadian SST warns pro-se filers over multiple fake cites; the same standard will reach counsel soon.

wcat-decision-a2501051-hilary-thomson-20.lesson: BC WCAT caught citation-format drift plus fabricated cases; check both the format and the existence of cited tribunal decisions.
